channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tech investor Cathie Wood on how Trump can boost the U.S. economy
item.description: U.S. tech investor Cathie Wood is calling on Donald Trump’s incoming administration to boost economic growth and policy certainty by backdating promised corporate and personal tax cuts to Jan. 1, 2025, she told Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: How the H1-B visa is causing strife within Trump’s coalition
item.description: An online spat between factions of Donald Trump’s supporters over immigration and the tech industry has thrown internal divisions in his political movement into public display, previewing the fissures and contradictory views his coalition could bring to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge
item.description: Gain insights into the future of ICAM and its role in secure, modern government operations. The post Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: How to put down your phone in 2025
item.description: There are certain social media rules we can all agree on: Ghosting a conversation is impolite, and replying “k” to a text is the equivalent of a backhand slap (violent, wrong, and rude).
item.dc:creator: Steffi Cao, Fast Company

item.title: AI is a game changer for students with disabilities. Schools are still learning to harness it
item.description: Getting the latest technology into the hands of students with disabilities is a priority for the U.S. Education Department.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pedal Ahead founder is out as California e-bike program operator, but questions and reporting discrepancies persist
item.description: The nonprofit was the subject of a criminal investigation earlier this year and a civil probe by the Air Resources Board, according to records.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Mcdonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Digital Signatures: A Step-by-Step Guide for Apple Devices
item.description: Learn how to create and use digital signatures on your Apple devices with this easy-to-follow guide.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Crypto readies its wish list for Trump
item.description: The cryptocurrency industry spent big in the 2024 election, and its investment is about to pay off in the incoming Congress and administration.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, The Hill

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Le tecnologie di frontiera del 2025: le previsioni degli analisti e la visione dei CIO
item.description: Se l’AI è la tecnologia del decennio, all’orizzonte si profila una rivoluzione tecnologica altrettanto dirompente: il calcolo quantistico.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Snowy owl rescued from car grille by Minnesota woman who saved another bird hours earlier
item.description: A great gray owl and a snowy owl are being treated by experts after being rescued by a northern Minnesota woman.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Fingerhut, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 6 ways to turn your IT help desk into a strategic asset
item.description: The IT help desk is often considered the “dungeon” department in most IT organizations: a place where those who can’t excel at anything more meaningful in IT are left to linger, or those who are just starting out in IT must prove their mettle before launching their “true” IT careers.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Python in 2024: Faster, more powerful, and more popular than ever
item.description: Over the course of 2024, Python has proven again and again why it’s one of the most popular, useful, and promising programming languages out there.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 45 years ago, the Walkman changed how we listen to music
item.description: Back in 1979, Sony cofounder Masaru Ibuka was looking for a way to listen to classical music on long-haul flights. In response, his company’s engineers dreamed up the Walkman, ordering 30,000 units for an initial production run.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: NASA's Parker Solar Probe aims to fly closer to the sun like never before
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A NASA spacecraft aims to fly closer to the sun than any object sent before. The Parker Solar Probe was launched in 2018 to get a close-up look at the sun. Since then, it has flown straight through the sun's corona: the outer atmosphere visible during a total solar eclipse.
item.dc:creator: ADITHI RAMAKRISHNAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Albania to close TikTok for a year blaming it for promoting violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — Albania's prime minister said Saturday the government will shut down the video service TikTok for one year, blaming it for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
